object_under_evaluation: runtime latency and resource-use tradeoff under matched fixture conditions
claim_boundary: This draft report can compare runtime latency and resource-use tradeoff under matched fixture conditions only under the named matched conditions and cannot rank general agent quality.
limitations: This report does not rank reasoning quality.
This report does not support cross-host leaderboard claims.
This report does not accept raw runtime evidence without bundle-local review.
latency_metric: chosen first-token latency aggregate under the matched fixture family
resource_metric: chosen runtime memory-pressure aggregate under the matched fixture family
matched_condition_summary: Baseline and candidate are compared on the same public-safe fixture family with matched preset, timeout, retry, and metric semantics.

per_case_comparisons.baseline_note: The baseline target is named and kept inspectable for review.
per_case_comparisons.candidate_note: The candidate evidence is represented only as a draft comparison input.
per_case_comparisons.latency_reading: The candidate may show lower latency only under the named matched metric.
per_case_comparisons.resource_reading: The candidate resource cost remains visible and separate from the latency reading.
per_case_comparisons.comparison_note: The draft readout preserves matched-condition comparison while avoiding a broad quality claim.
